asset.title: Startup Diligence War Room
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough effectively demonstrates a multi-agent startup diligence workflow, showing spreadsheet enrichment, agent execution traces, and private drafting. The UI is highly functional and fits the product narrative well.

featureClarity.evidence: The video shows the transition from a shared spreadsheet to research enrichment and agent execution, though the density of the UI requires close attention.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates the full flow from triggering enrichment to viewing agent traces and initiating a private draft handoff.

visualDesign.evidence: The dark mode interface is modern and structured, though the layout is highly dense with multiple panels.

consistency.evidence: Aligns perfectly with the NodeRoom concept of combining spreadsheets, collaborative agents, and execution traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Captured directly from a live running application with realistic data and real-time trace updates.

legibility.evidence: Most text and status chips are readable, though some smaller terminal outputs and trace logs may be hard to read on smaller screens.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial analysts, venture capital diligence teams, and operations engineers.

productionHonesty.evidence: Clearly displays the step-by-step execution of background agents and the manual approval gates.

observedEvidence: Spreadsheet view with Q3 diligence data
Research tab with pending accounts enriched to complete
Room trace showing agent execution logs
Copilot chat with multi-agent command execution
Private tab showing private agent interaction and handoff drafts

defects.observed: The command execution and transition to the private tab happen very quickly, which might make it hard for a first-time viewer to follow.
defects.fix: Slightly extend the pause duration after executing the command before switching tabs.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Run collaborative startup diligence with automated research enrichment, real-time agent execution traces, and secure private drafting.
